mapper.select: SELECT m.user_id AS userId, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM cs_message m WHERE m.direction = 'user' AND (m.is_read IS NULL OR m.is_read = false) AND m.created_at >= #{since} GROUP BY m.user_id
SELECT m.user_id FROM cs_message m WHERE m.agent_id IS NULL AND m.direction = 'user' GROUP BY m.user_id ORDER BY MIN(m.created_at) ASC LIMIT #{limit}
